message:
Merge {/[ branches, replace 3 booleans with pending enum in autocomplete

Merge duplicate '{' and '[' switch branches using the matched char
directly for container_stack push. Replace mutually exclusive
after_colon/after_comma_in_obj/after_comma_in_arr booleans with a
single pending enum, simplifying the atom-completion guard from 5
negated conditions to 1.
